Meta Description 1: Veterans Transition Support (VTS) provides military to civilian career transition support, job training, and certifications for active duty service members and veterans online and in San Diego County CA.
Many veterans leave the military with incredible skills — but without clear information about the programs, certifications, and career opportunities available
